title: AI-Enabled Smart Healthcare Platform
shortDesc: Microservices-based healthcare platform with telemedicine, AI assistance, and secure medical record management.
fullDesc: A comprehensive microservices-based healthcare platform enabling appointment booking, telemedicine, secure medical record management, and online payments. Integrated AI-powered assistance using Google Gemini API, real-time video consultations via Agora RTC, automated notifications through Brevo SMTP and Twilio, and scalable role-based access control for patients, doctors, and administrators.
problem: Healthcare systems in Sri Lanka lack integrated digital solutions for appointment booking, telemedicine, and secure record management. Patients and doctors need a unified platform that supports multilingual interfaces and multiple payment gateways.
solution: Built a microservices architecture with React + Vite frontend, Node.js/Express backends, MongoDB Atlas storage, Docker containerization, and Google Gemini AI for intelligent assistance. Integrated real-time video via Agora RTC and payment processing via Stripe and PayHere.

title: FarmLink – Smart Agricultural Platform
shortDesc: Flutter mobile app connecting farmers, distributors, and consumers with crop auctions, GPS logistics, and weather insights.
fullDesc: A Flutter-based mobile application that connects farmers, distributors, transporters, and consumers through crop auctions, logistics management, and real-time tracking. Features include multilingual support, GPS-enabled delivery management, weather insights via OpenWeatherMap API, push notifications, and secure cloud-based data management using Firebase.
problem: Agricultural supply chains in Sri Lanka suffer from inefficiencies caused by fragmented communication between farmers, distributors, and consumers, leading to food waste and revenue loss for farmers.
solution: Developed a cross-platform Flutter app with Firebase backend. Used Google Maps Platform for GPS tracking, OpenWeatherMap for weather insights, Firebase Cloud Messaging for push notifications, and Firebase Cloud Functions (Node.js/TypeScript) for serverless business logic.

title: Safari Booking Management System
shortDesc: Full-stack MERN web app for managing safari bookings with AI trip planning, subscriptions, and Stripe payments.
fullDesc: A full-stack web application using the MERN stack and RESTful APIs for managing safari bookings. Features include AI-based trip planning, user subscriptions, vehicle scheduling, comprehensive booking management, and secure Stripe payment processing.
problem: Safari operators in Sri Lanka manage bookings manually or through fragmented systems, leading to double-bookings, revenue loss, and poor customer experience.
solution: Built a MERN stack application with RESTful APIs, integrated AI-based trip planning recommendations, Stripe payment gateway, vehicle scheduling system, and a comprehensive admin dashboard for booking management.

title: Boarding House Management System
shortDesc: MERN web system for room allocations, tenant records, rent tracking, and maintenance request management.
fullDesc: A web-based system to manage room allocations, tenant records, rent tracking, and maintenance requests, improving operational efficiency using a full-stack development approach. Built with the complete MERN stack featuring a responsive React frontend and robust Node.js/Express API.
problem: Boarding house owners in Sri Lanka manage tenant records and payments manually using spreadsheets, leading to errors, missed payments, and poor tenant experience.
solution: Designed and developed a MERN stack application with modules for room management, tenant onboarding, automated rent reminders, maintenance ticket tracking, and a comprehensive admin dashboard with analytics.

title: Finance Tracker Android App
shortDesc: Android app for personal finance tracking with expense categorization, budget alerts, and real-time Firebase sync.
fullDesc: Designed and developed a personal finance tracking Android application using Kotlin and Firebase. Features include expense categorization by type, budget tracking with threshold alerts, real-time data synchronization across devices, intuitive UI designed in Figma, and detailed spending analytics.
problem: Young professionals struggle to track personal finances effectively using generic apps that lack local context and intuitive budget management features.
solution: Built a native Android app in Kotlin with Material Design UI, Firebase Firestore for real-time sync, Firebase Authentication for secure login, and custom charts for spending visualization. UI prototyped in Figma.

title: HelpNet – Customer Care System
shortDesc: Responsive web platform for customer support tickets, agent interactions, and admin monitoring.
fullDesc: HelpNet is a responsive customer care web platform for managing customer support tickets, user authentication, agent interactions, admin monitoring, and email notifications for efficient service resolution.
problem: Businesses lack affordable, customizable customer support systems that integrate ticket management, agent routing, and real-time admin monitoring in one platform.
solution: Built a JavaScript and CSS-based web application with modules for ticket creation, agent assignment, status tracking, email notifications, and an admin dashboard for performance monitoring.
